title: coreopsis floridana
intro: Coreopsis floridana, also known as Florida tickseed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis floridana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Coreopsis floridana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for various herbal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
